title: Monica, O My Darling
posterAlt: Monica, O My Darling (2022) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A slick robotics expert joins a murderous plot after a passionate affair takes a sudden turn, but nothing — not even death — is what it seems to be.
synopsis: Released in 2022, Monica, O My Darling is a crime, comedy and drama film from India. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
